title: 信息日报 2026-06-16

headline.title: “订书钉”状颗粒材料可快速变强或变弱，有望用于可回收建筑
headline.summary: 科学家发现，订书钉形状的颗粒能缠结形成既强且韧的材料。不同于传统材料，这些颗粒可通过振动锁定成坚固结构或快速解开。这一特性有望用于可回收建筑、可重构结构等。
headline.title_en: Staple-shaped particles can become strong or fall apart in seconds, pointing to recyclable buildings
headline.summary_en: Scientists have found that staple-shaped particles can tangle together to create a material that is both strong and flexible. Unlike conventional materials, these particles can be locked into a sturdy structure or rapidly unraveled using vibrations, with potential applications in recyclable buildings and reconfigurable structures.
headline.original_title: This strange material can become strong or fall apart in seconds
headline.reason: 该发现代表材料科学重大突破，评分最高（10.85），且具有广泛的应用前景和新闻价值。
headline.reason_en: This discovery represents a major material science breakthrough with the highest score (10.85) and broad application potential and news value.
